meta.question: Where is the APS model located in the package hierarchy?
meta.finalAnswer:
The APS model (TMT-APS DDD) is located in the following package hierarchy:

**Full Package Path:**
```
TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::09 Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS DDD
```

**Key Hierarchy Levels:**
1. **TMT** (root project)
2. **Project**
3. **Work Packages**
4. **Telescope**
5. **WorkPackages**
6. **Control**
7. **Alignment and Phasing System**
8. **Systems Engineering**
9. **09 Views**
10. **TMT-APS-SE** (parent package for APS Systems Engineering)
11. **TMT-APS DDD** (the main APS model - Domain Definition Document)

The TMT-APS DDD package contains 272 owned elements and is the primary package for the Alignment and Phasing System's domain definition within the TMT project structure.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found multiple APS-related elements. Need to explore the package hierarchy for the main APS model package (TMT-APS DDD) to trace its parent packages.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20DDD" . 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?owner ?ownerName WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20DDD" . 
  ?elem vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?namespace ?nsName WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20DDD" . 
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_namespace ?namespace .
  ?namespace vocab:NamedElement_name ?nsName .
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?parent ?parentName WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20DDD" .
  ?parent vocab:Package_packagedElement ?elem .
  ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
}

request.reason: Found the qualified name which reveals the full package hierarchy. Now need to trace parent packages to confirm the hierarchy path.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?parent ?parentName WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName "TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::09%20Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%20DDD" .
  ?parent vocab:Package_packagedElement ?elem .
  ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?nesting ?nestingName WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName "TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::09%20Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%20DDD" .
  ?elem vocab:Package_nestingPackage ?nesting .
  ?nesting vocab:NamedElement_name ?nestingName .
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?qualifiedName WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT-APS-SE")))
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qualifiedName .
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name ?qualifiedName WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qualifiedName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?qualifiedName, "TMT-APS"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name ?qualifiedName WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qualifiedName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?qualifiedName, "Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System"))
}
LIMIT 20

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name ?qualifiedName WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qualifiedName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?qualifiedName, "Systems%20Engineering::09%20Views"))
}
LIMIT 10

request.reason: Found the complete package hierarchy from the qualified names. The APS model (TMT-APS DDD) is nested within the TMT-APS-SE package under 09 Views in the Systems Engineering hierarchy.
